_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to demonstrate and explain how movement concepts about effort, space, time, objects, and people can enhance our physical performance.

_source.w: We are learning to demonstrate and explain how movement concepts about effort, space, time, objects, and people can enhance our physical performance.
y: Explicit understanding of movement concepts makes us more intentional and effective movers.
Being able to explain these concepts shows deep understanding, not just physical ability.
This knowledge helps us analyse and improve both our own and others' performances.
eg: Explaining how adjusting effort level changes the effectiveness of a sporting action.
Demonstrating how using space strategically creates opportunities in team games.
Analysing how timing affects the success of a sequence of movements.
Discussing how awareness of other players improves decision-making during a game.
Applying movement concepts to improve a gymnastics or dance routine.
Coaching a peer using movement concept terminology to help them improve.
